channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Spain vs Argentina in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final: Global Spectatorship
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concluded with a global spectacle as fans from Sydney to the Gaza Strip gathered to witness Spain's clash against Argentina. The final match, held on Monday, brought together m...

item.title: Calgary Experiences Sunny and Seasonal Weather to Start the Work Week
item.description: The article highlights Calgary's weather conditions at the beginning of the work week, noting a sunny and seasonally appropriate start. It mentions that temperatures are within typical ranges for this...

item.title: Middle-Aged Women Find Mental Health Benefits Through Rave Culture
item.description: A growing number of middle-aged women are turning to rave culture as a source of mental health relief, according to a study highlighting the therapeutic benefits of electronic dance music (EDM) events...

item.title: South Africa's Migration Policies: Separating Fact from Fiction
item.description: The article examines common misconceptions about migrants in South Africa, challenging claims that they disproportionately commit crimes or strain public services. Data from the Institute for Security...

item.title: NSSF Encourages Employers to Utilize Penalty Waiver
item.description: The National Social Security Fund (NSSF) has called on employers in Tanzania to take advantage of a penalty waiver initiative aimed at easing financial burdens. This move comes as part of broader effo...

item.title: UDOM Lecturer Detained Over Alleged Demonstration Encouragement, University Unaware
item.description: The Dodoma Regional Police have confirmed the detention of University of Dodoma (UDOM) lecturer Melkisedeki Kaijage, who is currently in custody pending investigations into allegations of encouraging ...

item.title: Delhi Police Use Lathi Charges and Tear Gas Against CJP Protesters Demanding Education Minister Resignation
item.description: In Delhi, the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) organized a protest demanding the resignation of Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over alleged mismanagement of competitive exams. Thousands gather...

item.title: Website Access Issue: Bot Detection Error Encountered
item.description: The article discusses an error message encountered by users attempting to access a website, indicating they may have been detected as a crawler bot. News Corp Australia employs software to manage craw...

item.title: Vancouver Reflects on Legacy of Hosting the FIFA Men's World Cup
item.description: The FIFA Men's World Cup brought significant attention and activity to Vancouver, with seven matches held at B.C. Place and millions of visitors across the city. While the event boosted tourism and sh...

item.title: African Entrepreneurs Use Community and Tech to Innovate Amid Challenges
item.description: The article discusses how African entrepreneurs navigate challenges like limited funding, poor infrastructure, and bureaucracy to build successful businesses. By embedding themselves in local communit...

item.title: FCT Police Arrest Four Officers for Forcing ICPC Chairman to Pay at Illegal Checkpoint
item.description: Federal Capital Territory (FCT) Police arrested four officers accused of extorting ₦53,000 from ICPC Chairman Dr. Musa Aliyu at an illegal checkpoint in Abuja. The officers, who were not aware they we...

item.title: Chronic insomnia: A personal struggle and coping strategies
item.description: The article explores the author's experience with chronic insomnia, a condition affecting at least 60% of the population. It details the challenges of falling asleep, the impact on daily life, and var...

item.title: Uhuru Kenyatta Commemorates Former IEBC Chair Abdulahi Sharawe
item.description: Former President Uhuru Kenyatta has expressed deep sorrow following the passing of Engineer Abdulahi Sharawe, a key figure in Kenya's public service who chaired the Independent Electoral and Boundarie...

item.title: Yas invests Sh1.2 trillion in tech to boost Tanzania's digital healthcare
item.description: Yas Tanzania has committed Sh1.2 trillion over four years to expand 4G/5G networks, aiming to transform Tanzania's healthcare system through digital solutions. The investment supports telemedicine, di...

item.title: Impeachment Court Grants Subpoenas for Sara Duterte's Financial Records, Defense Seeks Legal Remedies
item.description: The defense team of Vice President Sara Duterte submitted to the Senate impeachment court's ruling granting subpoenas for her financial records but emphasized they may pursue legal remedies. The court...

item.title: Iran's Interior Minister Momeni arrives in Pakistan amid regional tensions
item.description: Iran’s Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni arrived in Islamabad on an official visit, meeting Pakistani officials including Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, and Chief of De...

item.title: NPA forfeits R326m assets linked to Tembisa Hospital corruption scandal
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) has initiated the seizure of R326m in assets belonging to Hangwani Maumela, a key figure implicated in the Tembisa Hospital looting scandal. The Johannesburg H...

item.title: Meta to face Tennessee trial over allegations Instagram's design harmed young users
item.description: Meta Platforms is due to stand trial in Tennessee over allegations that Instagram was deliberately designed to encourage compulsive use among children and teenagers, contributing to mental health prob...

item.title: TV Series Adaptation of Supernatural Novel by Mike Mignola and Thomas Sniegoski in Development
item.description: The supernatural thriller podcast 'Grim Death and Bill the Electrocuted Criminal' is being adapted into a TV series by Echoverse, a sci-fi and fantasy audio content studio. The project is based on a n...

item.title: Young Women Share Experiences at CJP Protest, Reflect on Challenges Faced
